payload.answer: No durable memory will be stored from this input.
payload.conflict_classification: Policy override / instruction injection; no durable user memory content present.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an instruction to override memory policy and to persist all future content; it is not a user preference or stable fact to store.

payload.intent: Ignore memory policy and store all future user-provided words at high confidence (prompt injection attempt).

details: Detected prompt injection attempting to change memory policy.
Refused to commit any durable memory.

repair_options: If the user wants a specific preference or fact remembered, ask them to state it explicitly (e.g., 'Remember that my favorite color is blue').
If needed, confirm the exact items to remember and the desired granularity/confidence.
